ar.listings.title: Federation Listings
ar.member_profile.external_member_descripti: This member belongs to an external federation partner. You can message them or send credits, but the full profile is hosted on their platform.
ar.member_profile.load_error: Could not load this member profile. Please try again.
ar.member_profile.not_found_description: This member is no longer available or could not be loaded.
ar.member_profile.optin_required_tooltip: Enable federation in your settings to connect with members on partner timebanks.
ar.members.external_profile_message: This member is on an external partner platform. Direct profile viewing is not available.
ar.members.federation_not_enabled: Federation is not enabled for your account.
ar.members.load_error: Could not load members. Please try again.
ar.members.no_members_available: No members are available in partner communities yet.
ar.members.no_members_search: Try adjusting your search or filters.
ar.members.no_partner_communities_descripti: Join the federation network to browse members from partner communities.
ar.members.subtitle: Discover and connect with members from partner communities.
ar.members.title: Federation Members
ar.messages.auto_translate_active_banner: Messages are being auto-translated to your language.
ar.messages.external_recipient_info: This message will be sent to an external partner server.
ar.messages.federation_not_enabled_descript: Enable federation to send and receive messages with partner communities.
ar.messages.load_error_retry: A network error occurred. Please try again.
ar.messages.no_messages_description: Send your first message to a member from a partner community.
ar.messages.optin_required_description: You need to opt into federation before sending messages to partner communities.
ar.messages.select_conversation_description: Choose a conversation from the list to read and reply.
ar.messages.send_error: Could not send message. Please try again.
ar.messages.send_error_retry: A network error occurred. Please try again.
ar.messages.subtitle: Send and receive messages with members from partner communities.
ar.messages.title: Federation Messages
ar.messages.unable_to_load_description: Could not load your federation messages. Please try again.
ar.onboarding.benefit_discover_description: Find and connect with partner communities worldwide.
ar.onboarding.benefit_exchange_description: Offer and request services across communities.
ar.onboarding.benefit_meet_description: Connect with members from partner communities.
ar.onboarding.communication_preferences_des: Control how members from partner communities can interact with you.
